title: Senior Software Engineer - SigTuple - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - SigTuple - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
SigTuple invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SigTuple:
SigTuple is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SigTuple!
